titles_tesim: Acts of Theodorus after His Martyrdom

Admirable and noble mimars written by our holy Father of the city of Euchaita concerning the mourners of the holy martyr of Christ, Theodorus, on the day of his remembrance on the twentieth day in the month of April
Book of the Prophecy of the Prophet Daniel
The Martyrdom of Stephen the Protomartyr
The marvels done by the the brave and noble martyr St. Theodorus following his martyrdom
The story of the martyrdom of Stephen, archdeacon and first of the martyrs
